use_cases: Product showcase cards with interactive 3D hover effects for e-commerce sites
Profile or portfolio cards that respond to mouse movement with tilt animations
Interactive image galleries where cards tilt toward the cursor
Feature highlight cards in SaaS landing pages with depth effects
Creative portfolio displays with dynamic shadow and perspective changes
ai_summary: An interactive 3D tilt card component that responds to mouse movement with perspective transforms and dynamic shadow effects. Features image upload capability via file input, creating a personalized card experience. The dark-themed design includes an orthogonal grid background pattern and uses calculated shadow offsets to enhance the 3D depth effect. Ideal for interactive product showcases, portfolio cards, or creative galleries.
